title: nassella charruana
intro: Nassella charruana, also known as the Argentine needle grass or Charrua grass, is a species of grass native to South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Nassella charruana include its ability to stimulate circulation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Nassella charruana is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used topically as a poultice or applied to the skin as a salve.
